creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Gleb Smirnoff from comment #4)
>If you ask me, I would support this decision.  Given that Alexander melifaro@
>has little time to support NetLink, the burden falls on me.  I'd prefer to be
>responsible for stable/14 only.  In general I have very conservative approach
>to stable branches, especially ex-stable.  I won't add NetLink to stable/13
>in the first place, if I was to decide.

Thank you for commenting on this, it gives valuable insight. Perhaps we should switch to netlink as the default flavor but only on FreeBSD 14.0 and later since the whole network stack seems to be fully netlink-oriented there and leave FreeBSD 13 as is - with its old rtsock defaults.
